narrative.summary: Anti-pretentious 'wine dive bar.' Named after a Bob's Burgers episode. Anonymous owner, ex-Momofuku alum. Wine by the ounce, no-frills romantic space. Opened early 2026, already a local staple. 5.0★ (23 reviews).

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Such a cool little spot. Rotating wine list, bar snacks, super knowledgeable staff, and they price by the ounce so you can try a bunch of different things. Dim lighting, cozy, and feels like a dive wine bar you’d stumble into in France. Easy to hang out here for way longer than planned."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "a rustic and chill wine bar that also has some of my favourite cocktails and music in the city. it’s only downfall is that now I don’t want to go anywhere else"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "the coziest little wine bar with a great wine selection and a super crispy beer. the staff are super friendly and helpful"
